_comment: MCP Servers Configuration. Paths are relative to the project root (MCP servers launch with CWD = project root), so this works on any checkout/platform. Simple servers speak MCP stdio (newline-delimited JSON) natively — no JS reframing bridge.

simple-pipe-mcp._info: Simple Pipe MCP server run from source (src/app/mcp/main.spl). Same server as simple-mcp, exposed under the SPipe-linked name.

simple-mcp._info: Simple MCP server run from source (src/app/mcp/main.spl).

simple-lsp-mcp._info: Simple LSP MCP server launched from this checkout (src/app/simple_lsp_mcp/main.spl).

stitch._info: Google Stitch MCP proxy (external node tool, not a Simple server).
